overview.forecast_unreliable: Need at least 3 days of usage for a reliable forecast
overview.forecast_failed: Forecast unavailable — couldn't reach the server
overview.risk_signals_offline: Couldn't reach server — alerts may be stale
overview.risk_signals_stale: ↻ Showing previous data — last refresh failed
overview.top_projects_empty: No projects with activity in the last 30 days

providers.no_usage: No usage found in last 30 days.
providers.no_local_scan_yet: No local activity yet — quota from your account
providers.stale_tooltip: Last updated {{age}} ago. Reopen the app to refresh.
providers.error_tooltip: Last sync failed: {{reason}}. Try Refresh quota now or check Settings → Integrations.
providers.force_refresh_tooltip: Run all provider collectors and reload server data without waiting for the next background sync.
providers.synced_ago_tooltip: Time since this provider's row last updated server-side. Refreshes every 30 s while this tab is open.
providers.quota_unavailable: Quota data unavailable — sign in on your phone or pair a Mac.
providers.server_unavailable: Couldn't load plan/quota from the server. Showing local-scan totals only.

sessions.empty: No AI CLI sessions running right now.
sessions.timeline_title: Last 24 hours — across all your devices
sessions.timeline_empty: No sessions in the last 24 hours.
sessions.timeline_stale: ↻ Showing previous data — last refresh failed: {{error}}

machine.title: Machine health
machine.local_note: Per-process data stays on this device — it is never uploaded.

swarm.title: Agent swarms
swarm.not_paired_hint: Sign in (Settings → Account) to see agent swarms across your devices.
swarm.disabled_hint: Remote Control is off. Enable it in Settings → Privacy.
swarm.load_failed: Couldn't load swarms — check your connection.
swarm.empty_hint: Swarms appear here when your paired devices run parallel agents in sibling git worktrees.

alerts.empty_body: Alerts fire when daily / weekly budgets are exceeded or when a single AI CLI process hits a CPU spike. Set your budget in Settings → Budget.
alerts.load_failed: Couldn't load alerts — check your connection.

settings.pair_hint: On macOS: open the CLI Pulse menu bar app → Settings → Connection → Set Up Sync, then type the 6-digit code shown there into the field below. Or sign in with email at the top of this section instead.
settings.budget_hint: Alerts fire once per day (or per week) when your CLI spend goes above these limits. Leave blank to disable.
settings.cpu_threshold_help: Alerts when one CLI process exceeds this for one scan.
settings.auto_sync_hint: Auto-sync runs every 2 minutes. Local scan + helper_sync.
settings.last_sync: Last sync {{time}} — {{sessions}} live sessions · {{cost}} over {{files}} files
settings.export_hint: Download the last {{days}} days of scanned usage as a spreadsheet.
settings.updates_hint: Updates are signed. Releases publish at github.com/JasonYeYuhe/cli-pulse-desktop/releases.
settings.unpair_confirm: Unpair this device? You can sign in again later with email, or pair from a Mac.
settings.about_diagnostics_hint: Copy this block when reporting an issue.
settings.about_sentry_test_tooltip: Fires a tagged Info event into Sentry so you can verify the crash-reporting chain is live. Check sentry.io for an event with diagnostic_test=true.
settings.about_save_bundle_tooltip: Saves a zip with cli-pulse.log, remote-hook.log, crash history, and a diagnostic snapshot to your Downloads folder. Review the contents before sharing — it does NOT contain credentials, but does contain log lines that may include cwd basenames.

integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure auth tokens for providers that don't use OAuth files. Saved with file-mode 0600 in your config dir.
integrations.storage_file_tooltip: Install gnome-keyring or kwallet on Linux to enable OS keychain storage.
integrations.cursor_cookie_help: Paste from cursor.com browser DevTools → Application → Cookies
integrations.copilot_token_help: From GitHub OAuth or your Copilot CLI's COPILOT_API_TOKEN env
integrations.clear_confirm_body: You'll need to re-paste it from the source. This can't be undone.
integrations.env_override_banner: The environment variable {{var}} is currently overriding this saved value. Remove it from your system to use this setting.
integrations.deepseek_api_key_help: Bearer key from platform.deepseek.com — shows your balance.
integrations.zai_api_key_help: Bearer key from z.ai (Z_AI_API_KEY) — shows your quota.
integrations.crof_api_key_help: Bearer key from crof.ai (CROF_API_KEY) — shows request quota + credits.
integrations.minimax_api_key_help: Bearer key from MiniMax (MINIMAX_API_KEY) — shows your coding-plan quota.
integrations.moonshot_api_key_help: Bearer key from Moonshot / Kimi platform (MOONSHOT_API_KEY) — shows your balance.
integrations.venice_api_key_help: Bearer key from Venice (VENICE_API_KEY) — shows your USD / DIEM balance.
integrations.kimi_k2_api_key_help: Bearer key from kimi-k2.ai (KIMI_K2_API_KEY) — shows your credit usage.
integrations.augment_cookie_help: Paste your app.augmentcode.com session cookie (AUGMENT_COOKIE) — shows credit usage. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.perplexity_cookie_help: Paste your perplexity.ai session cookie (PERPLEXITY_COOKIE) — shows credit balance. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.t3chat_cookie_help: Paste your t3.chat session cookie (T3CHAT_COOKIE) — shows 4-hour + monthly usage. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.stepfun_cookie_help: Paste your platform.stepfun.com cookie incl. Oasis-Token (STEPFUN_COOKIE) — shows 5-hour + weekly usage. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.warp_api_key_help: Bearer token from Warp (WARP_API_KEY) — shows your request limit + bonus credits.
integrations.kimi_auth_token_help: Paste your kimi.com kimi-auth token or full cookie header (KIMI_AUTH_TOKEN) — shows weekly + 5h usage. Tokens expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.grok_cookie_help: Paste your grok.com session cookie (GROK_COOKIE), or set GROK_TOKEN — shows your credit usage. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.glm_api_key_help: Bearer key from Zhipu / GLM (GLM_API_KEY) — status-only (no quota endpoint); shows connectivity + balance if available.
integrations.volcano_api_key_help: Bearer key from Volcano Engine / Ark (ARK_API_KEY) — shows plan quota if available, else connectivity.
integrations.groq_api_key_help: Bearer key from Groq (GROQ_API_KEY) — status-only; shows live throughput (req/min · tok/min).
integrations.mistral_cookie_help: Paste your admin.mistral.ai session cookie incl. ory_session_* (MISTRAL_COOKIE) — shows exact month-to-date spend. Cookies expire; re-paste to refresh.
integrations.deepgram_api_key_help: API key from Deepgram (DEEPGRAM_API_KEY) — status-only; shows usage counts (requests · audio hrs · tokens). Pin one project via DEEPGRAM_PROJECT_ID.
integrations.elevenlabs_api_key_help: API key from ElevenLabs (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY or XI_API_KEY) — shows the monthly character quota (used / limit) with renewal, plus voice-slot tiers.
integrations.kilo_api_key_help: API key from Kilo (KILO_API_KEY) — shows your credit balance and Kilo Pass subscription usage as a dollar figure. Falls back to the Kilo CLI login (~/.local/share/kilo/auth.json) when no key is set.
integrations.alibaba_api_key_help: API key for the Alibaba (Model Studio / Bailian) coding plan (ALIBABA_CODING_PLAN_API_KEY) — shows 5-hour, weekly, and monthly request quotas. Routes to the International console first, falling back to China mainland.
integrations.openai_admin_key_help: Organization admin key (sk-admin-…, OPENAI_ADMIN_KEY) for the OpenAI org cost API — shows this month's total spend. Distinct from the Codex CLI; a regular sk- key won't work.
integrations.codebuff_api_key_help: API key from Codebuff (CODEBUFF_API_KEY) — shows your credit balance as a quota gauge with reset, plus a best-effort weekly window and plan tier.
integrations.manus_cookie_help: Paste your Manus session cookie or session_id value (MANUS_SESSION_TOKEN) — shows your monthly and refresh credit pools. Session cookies expire, so re-paste if it stops updating.
integrations.abacus_cookie_help: Paste your Abacus AI session cookie (ABACUS_COOKIE) — shows your organization compute-points balance as a quota gauge, plus billing tier and reset. Session cookies expire, so re-paste if it stops updating.

settings.privacy_body: Allow this account to participate in cross-device approvals. When enabled, your other devices' Claude / Codex hooks can ask you to approve permission requests from this Windows app.
settings.privacy_consent_body_b1: Default OFF. Server-side gate enforced on every helper RPC.
settings.privacy_consent_body_b2: Provider keys, tokens, transcripts, and full project paths are never uploaded.
settings.privacy_consent_body_b3: High-risk requests (rm -rf, sudo, curl, ssh, scp, chmod 777, etc.) cannot be approved remotely — they always fall through to the originating device's local prompt.
settings.hook_install_body: Run this once on this Windows machine to register the CLI Pulse hook in Claude Code's settings.json. Without it, permission requests originating on this machine won't surface in Remote Approvals.
settings.hook_install_status_ok: Hook installed and points to this CLI Pulse install.
settings.hook_install_status_stale: Hook is installed but points to a different CLI Pulse install. Update the path to fix.
settings.hook_install_done_unchanged: Hook is already up to date.

danger.heading: Danger Zone
danger.clear_caches_body: Wipes scan + dashboard caches on this machine. You stay signed in; the next sync re-fetches everything.
danger.delete_account_body: Permanently deletes your account, every paired device, and all server-side data. This cannot be undone.

updater.error_network: Network error during update. Check your connection and try again. ({{error}})
updater.error_permissions: Update needs more permission to write the new files. Try running as administrator. ({{error}})
updater.error_disk_full: Not enough disk space to install the update. Free up some space and try again. ({{error}})
updater.error_path_not_found: Couldn't write to the install directory. This sometimes happens with per-user installs — please download the update manually. ({{error}})
updater.error_signature: Update signature didn't verify. Don't install — please report this. ({{error}})

messages.err_budget_nonneg: Daily budget must be a non-negative number.
messages.err_weekly_nonneg: Weekly budget must be a non-negative number.
messages.err_cpu_range: CPU threshold must be between 0 and 100.

signin.heading: Sign in to CLI Pulse
signin.hint: Enter your email — we'll send a verification code. New users sign up automatically.
signin.spam_hint: Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive in a minute.
signin.show_legacy: Have a Mac? Pair from the menu bar instead.

misc.scanning_hint: Scanning ~/.claude and ~/.codex for the past 30 days…

remote.title: Remote Approvals
remote.disabled_hint: Remote Control is off. Enable in Settings → Privacy.
remote.high_risk_blocked_tooltip: High-risk requests must be approved on the originating device.
remote.error_already_decided: Already decided on another device — refreshing list.
remote.session_interrupt_tooltip: Send Ctrl+C-equivalent (interrupt the current operation; the session keeps running).
remote.session_prompt_placeholder: Type a prompt to send to the session…
remote.session_start_cwd_help: Where Claude should run. The path stays local; only an HMAC fingerprint and the basename are uploaded.
remote.agent_status_not_running: Agent loop not running (sign in to enable)
